# count

**Instance Property**

The number of material properties in the material.

## Declaration

```swift
var count: Int { get }
```

## Accessing material properties with subscript syntax

- **subscript(_:)**: Returns the material property with the specified name, for use with subscript syntax.
- **subscript(_:)**: Returns the material property at the specified index in the material, for use with subscript syntax.

items.description: Returns the material property with the specified name, for use with subscript syntax.
items.name: subscript(_:)

items.description: Returns the material property at the specified index in the material, for use with subscript syntax.
items.name: subscript(_:)
